chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 46 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.7156/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7157/2023 (C/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.1727/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of CMA No.1728/2023 (C/A) 07.03.2024 M/s Abdul Sattar Shar and Ihsan Ali Lund Baloch, Advocates for petitioners. Mr. Shahid Hussain Jogi, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Zafar Iqbal Phulpoto, Additional Director, Local Government Department, Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition, filed by petitioners claiming to be employees of Town Committee, Thari Mirwah for release of salaries was disposed of on 31.03.2021 with the directions to the petitioners to approach the Scrutiny Committee, in the wake of respondents’ reservations over the genuineness of their appointment, for verification. In compliance, a comprehensive report has been submitted by the Additional Director, Local Government Department, Khairpur, who is present in person also. He states that out of 41 petitioners, 29 petitioners appeared and examined by the Scrutiny Committee. Out of 29, 11 petitioners were found to have been receiving salaries from other Town Committees. Further 03 petitioners did not appear before the Scrutiny Committee for verification purpose. Finally, only 13 petitioners namely, Hidayat Ali S/o Aijaz Ali Shar, Nizakat Ali S/o Ali Hassan Shar, Muhammad Aslam S/o Sultan Ahmed Soomro, Rashid Ali S/o Gulmir Channa, Zafar Ali S/o Atta Muhammad Dasti, Hafeez Ur Rehman S/o Muhammad Mithal, Ahsan Ali S/o Muhammad Ali Jogi, Ghulam Murtaza S/o Zakir Hussain Jogi, Shafi Muhammad S/o Ghulam Muhammad Awan, Nisar Ahmed S/o Muhammad Tagiyal

Further 03 petitioners did not appear before the Scrutiny Committee for verification purpose. Finally, only 13 petitioners namely, Hidayat Ali S/o Aijaz Ali Shar, Nizakat Ali S/o Ali Hassan Shar, Muhammad Aslam S/o Sultan Ahmed Soomro, Rashid Ali S/o Gulmir Channa, Zafar Ali S/o Atta Muhammad Dasti, Hafeez Ur Rehman S/o Muhammad Mithal, Ahsan Ali S/o Muhammad Ali Jogi, Ghulam Murtaza S/o Zakir Hussain Jogi, Shafi Muhammad S/o Ghulam Muhammad Awan, Nisar Ahmed S/o Muhammad Tagiyal C. P. No. D – 42 of 2016 Page 2 of 2 Veesar, Mir Hazar Khan S/o Wakeel Ahmed Veesar, Roshan Ali S/o Qurban Ali Dasti and Akhtiar Hussain S/o Ghulam Ali Veesar were found to have been genuinely appointed, and therefore, entitled to salaries. We, therefore, dispose of the listed applications by directing the competent authority to act in the light of compliance report in respect of aforementioned 13 petitioners and release their salaries in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
